headline: Zenerate Announces Partnership with AvalonBay Communities to Support Early-Stage Multifamily Feasibility Analysis
summary: Zenerate, an AI-powered real estate feasibility platform, is pleased to announce a new partnership with AvalonBay Communities, Inc., one of the leading multifamily housing companies in the United States.
